title: Find My Device - Stop button
scenario: Find My Device Stop button does not stop the tone or re-enable the Play button after starting the tone
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Locate the Find My Device section
Tap the Play button (blue geo icon) to start the Find My Device tone
Wait for the tone to begin playing on the device
expected: The Find My Device tone stops immediately, and the Play button becomes available again for re-tapping.
